arts.ttl: “You have to congratulate Hansi Flick and Barcelona” – Real Madrid icon Toni Kroos
arts.sum: Barcelona will not win the Champions League this season, but their efforts in the competition have been commended by many in recent months. And the latest to give praise to the Catalan side is Real Madrid icon Toni Kroos. Toni Kroos praises Barcelona after impressive Champions League run Speaking on his ‘Einfach mal Luppen’ podcast […] The post “You have to congratulate Hansi Flick and Barcelona” – Real Madrid icon Toni Kroos appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a fact’ – Former Real Madrid star hails Hansi Flick’s Barcelona
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid standout Toni Kroos has this weekend moved to reveal his appreciation for fellow countryman Hansi Flick’s Barcelona. This comes, of course, after the Blaugrana played their part…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti takes one final swipe at Barcelona ahead of Real Madrid exit
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti could be overseeing his final El Clasico on Sunday when Real Madrid face Barcelona in a game with major title implications ahead of the Italian's expected exit

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms key Barcelona pair won’t start vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has ruled two key members of his squad out of contention for starting berths in tomorrow’s crunch showdown with Real Madrid. The pair in question?…

arts.ttl: 3 Things Real Madrid Must Do to Finally Beat Barcelona This Season
arts.sum: Real Madrid have one last opportunity to defeat Barcelona in the final El Clásico of the La Liga season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Real Madrid: Alejandro Balde plan confirmed with defender passed fit for El Clasico
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick intends to use Alejandro Balde off the bench in Sunday's La Liga clash against Real Madrid, with the left-back not yet ready to start.

arts.ttl: What Barcelona need to win LaLiga against Real Madrid: fixtures and matches until the end
arts.sum: Barcelona and Real Madrid will play a decisive match on Sunday in the race for LaLiga . In the event of a draw against the Balearic side and a win for the Catalans in Cornella, the difference would be six points.

arts.ttl: Transfer to Aston Villa seen seen as intermediate step – Then player can sign for Real Madrid or Barcelona
arts.sum: Tomorrow is El Clásico, and a rather important one at that with La Liga still up for grabs. Saturday’s edition of Catalan newspaper Sport stretches things a bit to say there could be another El Clásico in the transfer market this summer, before accepting a move to somewhere like Aston Villa or Bournemouth looks likelier. The post Transfer to Aston Villa seen seen as intermediate step – Then player can sign for Real Madrid or Barcelona appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Barcelona-Real Madrid: Why this is the most important Clásico in years
arts.sum: El Clásico is always huge, but with Barcelona and Real Madrid meeting so late in the season with a title still on the line, this is one for the ages.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich enter concrete talks with defender despite agreement with Barcelona
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah is set to spark a major transfer war this summer as he nears a departure from Bayer Leverkusen when his contract expires on June 30. The German international has emerged as a top target for FC Barcelona, with the club having been working on a deal for him since last year. However, there […]
